3189020.name: Kardiya: The Winds of Fate
3189020.description:
Write Your Path With Your Dice

Shape your fate with your Digoksin dice. You will not always get the result you want, but that does not mean you are on the wrong path. It simply changes the story. 

Build Your Power Piece by Piece

What kind of character do you want to become? Muscular? Wise? Or a smooth talker? Design your character through the items you collect. 

Forge Bonds and Change the Story

Your relationship with the companions you recruit and travel with will deeply affect your fate. Choose carefully who you decide to grow close to. 

Die, Return Stronger, Rewrite the Story

Death is not the end, you have experienced it thousands of times. Live your story, die, return stronger and dive into a different version of it. 

Can You Find The Winds of Fate?

Among all these paths, can you find the one that saves everyone and uncover the Winds of Fate?
3189020.supported_languages:
英语*, 土耳其语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
